headline: Lululemon price target lowered by Jefferies ahead of Q4 earnings on leadership uncertainty
summary: Jefferies lowered its price target on Lululemon Athletica Inc (NASDAQ:LULU) ahead of the company’s fourth quarter earnings, citing leadership uncertainty, governance tensions and rising competition as key concerns that could keep the stock under pressure. The firm cut its price target to $170...

headline: Fed Meeting, PPI, Nvidia Conference: What to Watch This Week
summary: The Federal Reserve's interest-rate decision dominates this week's calendar. Investors will also closely monitor February’s producer-price index for inflation signals, alongside a corporate earnings slate featuring Micron, Lululemon and FedEx.

headline: Lululemon Founder Chip Wilson Warns CEO Candidates: Fix The Board First
summary: Lululemon Athletica Inc. founder Chip Wilson sent an open letter on Wednesday to prospective CEO candidates. He urged them to scrutinize the company's board before accepting the role. Wilson, one of Lululemon's largest shareholders, controls approximately 9.9 million shares. Wilson Questions Board's Fitness To Lead Wilson warned that three CEO departures without a ready successor signal deeper structural failure.
